addon.name: [COLOR red]The Red Wizard[/COLOR]
addon.provider-name: Slam, Sarge, Funsterbe, BYB, Zaxxon709, [COLOR red]The Red Wizard[/COLOR]

extension.summary: [COLOR red]The Red Wizard for Alpha and Beta releases of The Red Wizard 22 fork of Kodi[/COLOR]
extension.description: [COLOR red]The Red Wizard for Alpha and Beta releases of The Red Wizard 22 fork of Kodi. The builds in this Wizard might not work, work fully, or be the latest versions!!![/COLOR]
extension.disclaimer: [COLOR red]The author of this add-on does not host any content and has no affiliation with the content providers[/COLOR]
extension.news: [COLOR red]2026-03-31 - Special version for testing Kodi 22 Piers and The Red Wizard 22 fork - Add-on name change in case The Red Wizard is already installed (Test Wizard would not install) - Screenshots updated - Provider Names and CREDITS.txt updated - Migrated from Debrid Manager (deprecated) to Account Manager Lite by Zaxxon709 - Multiple changes to Fresh Start settings - Builds and notifications point to The Red Wizard test environment - The Red Wizard has a new home! Go to https://redwizard.xyz[/COLOR]
